reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de Matías. Considero colocar carteles grandes cuándo no se pueda pagar con lá aplicación ni El mercado pago. Muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from Matías. I would consider putting up large signs when payment cannot be made through the app or Mercado Pago. Thank you very much.
